message:
fix(quiescence,epoch): align basic quiescence with Q1-Q4 contract, add checkpoint waivers

quiescence: Make asx_quiescence_check() reject CLOSED regions with pending
cleanup entries, aligning the basic API with the formal Q1-Q4 quiescence
contract and preventing disagreement with asx_quiescence_check_detailed().
Add regression test. (bd-nw1s, FuchsiaHare)

epoch: Add ASX_CHECKPOINT_WAIVER annotations to 3 bounded combinator
branch-add loops in epoch-scoped combinators.

beads: Enrich bd-nw1s close reason with evidence linkage.

Guarantee Impact Block:
- gs_id: GS-011
- change: Tighten asx_quiescence_check to require cleanup-drained state,
  matching existing detailed check. Add checkpoint waivers (comments only).
- preserved invariants: Quiescence contract strengthened to match formal
  specification. No existing passing test changes behavior. New test covers
  the prior false-positive case.
- proof artifacts: tests/unit/runtime/test_quiescence.c, tests/e2e/e2e_core_lifecycle.c
- fallback mode: Revert quiescence.c cleanup check to restore prior behavior.
- deterministic isomorphism note: Quiescence check is read-only query.
  Checkpoint waivers are comments stripped by compiler.
- semantic delta budget: 0
- traceability refs: TRC-SEM-001, TRC-QUIESCENCE-001
- artifact links: build/tests/unit/runtime/, tools/ci/artifacts/conformance/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -419,7 +419,7 @@ ASX_API void asx_scheduler_event_reset(void);
  * ------------------------------------------------------------------- */
 
 /* Check if a region has reached quiescence (all tasks completed,
- * all obligations resolved, region is CLOSED).
+ * all obligations resolved, cleanup stack drained, region is CLOSED).
  *
  * Preconditions: id must be a valid region handle.
  * Returns ASX_OK if quiescent, ASX_E_NOT_FOUND if id is invalid,
